name: OpenHolidays API
tagline: Look up public and school holidays for many countries
description: Retrieve public and school holidays, supported countries, subdivisions, and languages from the free, open-data OpenHolidays API. No account or API key is required.

auth.hint: No credential required. This is a free, open-data public API.

tools.name: list_public_holidays
tools.description: List public holidays for a country within a date range, optionally scoped to a subdivision (state/province).

params.name: validFrom
params.description: Start of the date range, e.g. 2026-01-01.

params.name: validTo
params.description: End of the date range, e.g. 2026-12-31 (maximum span is 3 years).

params.name: languageIsoCode
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code for holiday names, e.g. EN.

params.name: subdivisionCode
params.description: Subdivision code to scope results, e.g. DE-BE.

tools.name: get_public_holidays_by_date
tools.description: Get all public holidays across supported countries that fall on a specific date.

params.name: languageIsoCode
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code for holiday names, e.g. EN.

tools.name: list_school_holidays
tools.description: List school holidays for a country within a date range, optionally scoped to a subdivision or holiday group.

params.name: validFrom
params.description: Start of the date range, e.g. 2026-01-01.

params.name: validTo
params.description: End of the date range (maximum span is 3 years).

params.name: languageIsoCode
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code for holiday names, e.g. EN.

params.name: subdivisionCode
params.description: Subdivision code to scope results, e.g. DE-BE.

params.name: groupCode
params.description: Holiday zone/group code to filter school holidays.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: List all countries supported by the API, with localized names.

params.name: languageIsoCode
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code for country names, e.g. EN.

tools.name: list_subdivisions
tools.description: List the administrative subdivisions (states, provinces, cantons) supported for a country.

params.name: languageIsoCode
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code for subdivision names, e.g. EN.
